idea-plugin.name: Tokyo Night Silent Storm
idea-plugin.description:
A dark theme for JetBrains Rider based on Tokyo Night Storm with a softer touch. Slightly lighter and warmer backgrounds reduce harsh contrast in daylight while keeping the full Tokyo Night Storm syntax palette intact.
Features: - Silent Storm palette: lighter/warmer backgrounds than official Storm for comfortable daylight use - Full ReSharper semantic highlighting: structs, enums, delegates, events, extension methods, generics - Dimmed inlay hints: subordinate to code, won't compete with LINQ chains or parameter lists - Extends Islands Dark — no chrome overrides that fight the IDE
